planning_gate.spec_delta: M19 separates knee-flexion shaping from the return phase instead of patching build_target symmetrically.

perspectives.product: tests the current ROADMAP next step: descend-only custom phase logic before browser replay
perspectives.architecture: wraps choose_blend to expose return_phase to the target patch while preserving exp71 gates
perspectives.qa: native JSON per candidate plus visible 8cm, knee/hip, contact, slip, return gates
perspectives.skeptic: this is still a heuristic target family; a true trajectory optimizer may still be required

report whether return-phase cutoff improves stable knee flexion beyond 0.516rad

sources.note: Humanoid squatting requires trajectory optimization and whole-body control, not an isolated knee target.
Squat-like humanoid motion uses CoM, feet pose, ZMP regulation, and joint-limit handling together.
G1-class loco-manipulation work reports squatting to specific heights via height tracking and curriculum.
Humanoid motion planning commonly reasons about CoM vertical motion and angular momentum.
